BMO and REX Shares Launch U.S. Big Banks and U.S. Big Oil Leveraged & Inverse Leveraged Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: BNKD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Wells Fargo & Company stock at 10.35%, Citigroup at 10.29%, Bank of America at 10.27%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 10.22%, and The PNC Financial Services Group at 10.14%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors U.S. Big Banks - 3 Inverse Leveraged ETN (BNKD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks 300% inverse of the daily performance of an equal-weighted index of US large banks. BNKD was launched on Feb 19, 2025 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
